err.message:
CypressError: Timed out retrying after 4050ms: `cy.click()` failed because this element:

`<button _ngcontent-gfg-c90="" class="btn btn-primary">Add car</button>`

is being covered by another element:

`<ngb-modal-window role="dialog" tabindex="-1" aria-modal="true" class="d-block modal fade show">...</ngb-modal-window>`

Fix this problem, or use {force: true} to disable error checking.

https://on.cypress.io/element-cannot-be-interacted-with
